hintDisplay: Sujeto: El reembolso / Verbo: ser (auxiliar pasivo) / Verbo: procesar (participio pasado) / Complemento: exitosamente
spanishSentence: El reembolso ha sido procesado exitosamente.
correctSentence: The refund has been processed successfully.

hints: Complemento: en el escaparate de la tienda
hintDisplay: Sujeto: Los artículos / Verbo: Exhibir (voz pasiva) / Complemento: en el escaparate de la tienda / Tiempo: ayer

correctSentence: The items were displayed in the shop window yesterday.

hints: Verbo: Perder (en voz pasiva, pasado continuo)

correctSentence: The receipt was being lost while the customer was leaving the store.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: el paquete / Verbo: ir (auxiliar para futuro próximo) / Verbo: ser (pasiva) / Verbo: entregar / Complemento: a tiempo / Negación: no

correctSentence: The package is not going to be delivered on time.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: La tienda / Verbo: estar (estado/condición) / Complemento: cerrada / Tiempo: todos los domingos
spanishSentence: La tienda está cerrada todos los domingos.
correctSentence: The store is closed every Sunday.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: El precio / Verbo: ser (voz pasiva) / Verbo: reducir (participio pasado) / Complemento: durante la venta / Tiempo: la semana pasada

correctSentence: The price was not reduced during the sale last week.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: el pedido / Verbo: cancelar (voz pasiva) / Complemento: por el cliente / Tiempo: ayer

correctSentence: This shirt should be discounted during the summer sale.

hints: Verbo: procesar (participio pasado en voz pasiva)

correctSentence: The order will be processed within 24 hours.

correctSentence: The items are going to be wrapped by the cashier before you leave the store.

correctSentence: The refund had been denied before the customer received the manager's explanation.
